summary: Fleet Planning - Unassign & Reassign Feature Testing Complete. All features working: Backend APIs (unassign/assign), Frontend UI (event action panel with Desaffecter/Reaffecter buttons), conflict detection, and force reassignment.

issues: React hydration warnings in console from Emergent preview wrapper injecting <span> into <select>/<option> - cosmetic only, does NOT affect functionality

backend_tests.test_reassign_to_different_driver: PASS - Can reassign from one driver to another
backend_tests.test_conflict_check_no_conflict: PASS - Returns conflict=false when no overlap
backend_tests.test_conflict_check_returns_conflict_inf: PASS - Returns conflict=true with message when overlap
backend_tests.test_assigned_not_in_unassigned: PASS - Assigned booking in driver events, not unassigned

frontend_tests.desaffecter_flow: PASS - Click Desaffecter -> booking moves to unassigned panel
frontend_tests.desaffecter_toast: PASS - 'Chauffeur retire - mission remise en attente'
frontend_tests.conflict_detection: PASS - Conflict warning appears when reassigning to busy driver
frontend_tests.zont_event_handling: VERIFIED IN CODE - Shows 'Les reservations Zont se gerent depuis le reseau Zont', no action buttons

verified_features: Backend PUT /api/fleet/my-bookings/{id}/unassign - removes driver, sets status='new'
Backend PUT /api/fleet/my-bookings/{id}/assign - reassigns driver to existing booking
Frontend: Click on SOCIETE (company) event opens action panel
Frontend: Action panel shows 'Desaffecter' (red) button - unassigns driver
Frontend: Action panel shows 'Reaffecter' (blue) button - opens driver dropdown
Frontend: After Desaffecter, mission moves back to unassigned panel
Frontend: After Reaffecter, mission moves to new driver's timeline
Frontend: Conflict check shows warning message with 'Forcer la reaffectation' button
Frontend: Close button (X) on action panel works correctly
Frontend: Zont events show info message 'Les reservations Zont se gerent depuis le reseau Zont' (code verified, no Zont events to test live)
critical_code_review_comments: FleetPlanning.js correctly implements event action panel with proper data-testid attributes
Reassign handler calls PUT /api/fleet/my-bookings/{id}/assign with driverId and driverName
Conflict check is performed before reassignment, shows warning if overlap detected
Force reassignment bypasses conflict check when user confirms
Zont events conditionally show info message instead of action buttons (source === 'zont')

All test IDs properly implemented: event-action-panel, event-unassign-btn, event-reassign-btn, event-reassign-form, event-reassign-select, event-reassign-confirm, event-reassign-force-btn, close-event-panel
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unassign/Reassign features fully tested and working. Test data: Bookings can be assigned/unassigned/reassigned. Conflict detection works when reassigning to driver with overlapping booking. Zont events show info message (code verified, requires live Zont bookings to test UI). Use date 2026-03-19 for testing.

mocked_api.note: Uses live C# backend (Zont API) + MongoDB. No mocking.
